2604.10874.title: AOP-Smart: A RAG-Enhanced Large Language Model Framework for Adverse Outcome Pathway Analysis
2604.10874.paper_summary: Adverse Outcome Pathways (AOPs) are an important knowledge framework in toxicological research and risk assessment. In recent years, large language models (LLMs) have gradually been applied to AOP-related question answering and mechanistic reasoning tasks. However, due to the existence of the hallucination problem, that is, the model may generate content that is inconsistent with facts or lacks evidence, their reliability is still limited. To address this issue, this study proposes an AOP-oriented Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework, AOP-Smart. Based on the official XML data from AOP-Wiki, this method uses Key Events (KEs), Key Event Relationships (KERs), and specific AOP information to retrieve relevant knowledge for user questions, thereby improving the reliability of the generated results of large language models. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method, this study constructed a test set containing 20 AOP-related question answering tasks, covering KE identification, upstream and downstream KE retrieval, and complex AOP retrieval tasks. Experiments were conducted on three mainstream large language models, Gemini, DeepSeek, and ChatGPT, and comparative tests were performed under two settings: without RAG and with RAG. The experimental results show that, without using RAG, the accuracies of GPT, DeepSeek, and Gemini were 15.0\%, 35.0\%, and 20.0\%, respectively; after using RAG, their accuracies increased to 95.0\%, 100.0\%, and 95.0\%, respectively. The results indicate that AOP-Smart can significantly alleviate the hallucination problem of large language models in AOP knowledge tasks, and greatly improve the accuracy and consistency of their answers.
2604.10874.paper_summary_zh: 不良結果途徑（AOPs）是毒理學研究和風險評估中的一個重要知識框架。近年來，大型語言模型（LLMs）逐漸被應用於與AOP相關的問題回答和機制推理任務。然而，由於存在幻覺問題，即模型可能生成與事實不一致或缺乏證據的內容，其可靠性仍然有限。為了解決這個問題，本研究提出了一個以AOP為導向的檢索增強生成（RAG）框架，AOP-Smart。基於來自AOP-Wiki的官方XML數據，該方法使用關鍵事件（KEs）、關鍵事件關係（KERs）和特定AOP信息來檢索用戶問題的相關知識，從而提高大型語言模型生成結果的可靠性。為了評估所提方法的有效性，本研究構建了一個包含20個與AOP相關的問題回答任務的測試集，涵蓋KE識別、上游和下游KE檢索以及複雜的AOP檢索任務。對三個主流大型語言模型進行了實驗，分別是Gemini、DeepSeek和ChatGPT，並在兩種設置下進行了比較測試：不使用RAG和使用RAG。實驗結果顯示，在不使用RAG的情況下，GPT、DeepSeek和Gemini的準確率分別為15.0%、35.0%和20.0%；在使用RAG後，它們的準確率分別提高到95.0%、100.0%和95.0%。結果表明，AOP-Smart可以顯著減輕大型語言模型在AOP知識任務中的幻覺問題，並大大提高其回答的準確性和一致性。
2604.10874.author: Qinjiang Niu et.al.
